caption: The video features a man standing on a stage at what appears to be an event hosted by the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop and podium. He is dressed in a casual blazer over a checkered shirt and dark pants. The setting includes an American flag and another flag with the institute's emblem. The man gestures with his hands as he speaks, suggesting he is delivering a speech or presentation. His body language indicates engagement and enthusiasm as he addresses the audience. The environment suggests a formal yet approachable atmosphere, likely aimed at discussing topics related to peace and international affairs.
